channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: If you’re not making many mistakes, you must not be learning much. Mistakes and failures are ultimat...
item.description:
If you’re not making many mistakes, you must not be learning much. Mistakes and failures are ultimately more valuable to you than successes because they provide the best learning.
I detailed some of my biggest mistakes—and what I learned from them—as part of the new MasterClass Executive program. At this stage in my life, I believe the most important thing I can do is to pass along everything I’ve learned to others, hoping that they find value in it and can avoid making the same mistakes I’ve made.
If you’re interested in the program, you can apply for one of the limited spots here: https://t.co/9wMKPLsuTY
--- @RayDalio | ❤️ 10 | 🔁 3 | 💬 1 | 👁 1060
item.author: @RayDalio

item.title: The universe is constantly unfolding—sending back more data and imagery than any team of scientists ...
item.description:
The universe is constantly unfolding—sending back more data and imagery than any team of scientists could ever interpret alone. AI and accelerated computing are changing that, helping researchers unlock discoveries at a scale and speed that wasn't possible before.
🔭 This #AstronomyDay, we're celebrating the scientists from @UCSC, Brant Robertson and his colleagues are turning cosmic complexity into real discovery, and making it available to everyone.
--- @nvidia | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 5 | 👁 382
item.author: @nvidia

item.title: RT @KieraDiss: Do these guys work for you? @Deliveroo https://t.co/t3UtazoUtj

item.title:
太阳镜架在帽子上忘了，一低头掉下来，我快速伸手接住。
那一瞬间感觉自己像超人。
然后立刻惋惜：怎么没有人看到。
item.description:
太阳镜架在帽子上忘了，一低头掉下来，我快速伸手接住。
那一瞬间感觉自己像超人。
然后立刻惋惜：怎么没有人看到。
--- @bearliu | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 323

item.title: Forget that, I say we implement a fully direct democracy. We have the technology now.
